_comment: Repository catalog for AI agent code discovery. Copy this structure into repos.json and replace with your project's actual repositories. The DoR agent (step 4-discover-repo.js) uses this to map ADO work item keywords to relevant repos for code search.

repos.name: {{REPO_NAME}}
repos._name_comment: Exact repository name as it appears in ADO (case-sensitive).
repos._project_comment: ADO project that owns this repo (may differ from the primary project in infra.json).
repos.description: Describe what this repo contains: tech stack, component types, markets/brands, team ownership. The more specific, the better the DoR agent's repo discovery.
repos._keywords_comment: Keywords from ADO work items that indicate this repo is relevant. Include: technology names, component types, area path segments, brand names.
